entity.summary: Universal decentralized exchange and ZetaChain AMM providing native-asset cross-chain swaps, stable-swap pools, smart routing, and liquidity services across Bitcoin and multiple EVM networks.
entity.notes: Current first-party Eddy Finance website identifies the platform as a Universal DEX and documents native-asset cross-chain transfer, cross-chain stable-swap pools, smart routers, supported networks, and exchange access. DefiLlama independently reports current ZetaChain AMM TVL, fees, and DEX volume. HEI consolidates EddyFinance and EddyFinance AMM source rows into one entity.

evidence.title: Eddy Finance official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website identifies Eddy Finance as a Universal DEX and documents native-asset cross-chain transfer, cross-chain stable-swap pools, smart routing, supported networks, and application access.

evidence.title: EddyFinance AMM metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies EddyFinance AMM as a ZetaChain DEX and reports current TVL, fees, and recent and cumulative DEX volume.

evidence.title: EddyFinance exchange discovery entries
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies EddyFinance AMM; HEI consolidates product and protocol source representations under one EddyFinance entity.
